overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a rainy, neon-lit urban park at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a character briefly before continuing through tree-lined paths, open plazas with fountains, and areas with homeless encampments, all illuminated by distinctive vertical cyan light posts.

events.description: character in yellow jacket walks past camera and exits frame to the left

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian through a rainy neon-lit park pathway

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket walking away then passing by the camera and exiting left

dark metal benches with trash bags piled nearby

tall modern buildings with illuminated windows visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character in a yellow jacket through a rainy urban park. Vertical cyan neon lights line the path while tall trees create a canopy overhead. The character passes by the camera and exits frame left, leaving the view of park benches and trash bags on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with vertical neon light posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the illuminated path between rows of trees

entered.detail: illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings
dense shrubbery along the pathway edges

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking through a tree-lined promenade illuminated by vertical cyan neon lights. The path is flanked by dense vegetation and benches with trash bags pass out of view. Digital billboards become visible on the distant skyscrapers as the camera moves deeper into the park.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with central fountain structure and homeless encampments

events.description: exiting tree corridor into open plaza area with central fountain structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a fountain structure in an open plaza area

entered.detail: circular water feature with stone edges in the plaza center
makeshift shelters and tarps indicating homeless encampments

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza featuring a central fountain structure surrounded by vertical neon lights. Makeshift tent encampments appear on both sides of the path. The tree canopy opens up to reveal more of the night sky and surrounding skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pathway with metal railings and makeshift tent encampments

events.description: passing a worker NPC tending to wooden crates on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past a worker and through a narrow path lined with tents and railings

notable_agents.action: worker in white tank top handling wooden crates near a barrel

entered.detail: black metal railings along the left side of the path
stacked wooden cargo crates near the worker

segments.scene_description: The path narrows with metal railings appearing on the left. A worker NPC tends to wooden crates near the railing. Tent encampments line the right side of the path. The fountain structure passes out of view behind as the camera moves into a more enclosed section of the park.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker park interior with picnic tables and distant neon lights

events.description: moving into darker area with reduced neon lighting, relying on distant ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing through the darker park area toward distant lights

entered.detail: wooden picnic tables and benches in a clearing

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes darker as the camera moves through a denser section of the park. Picnic tables appear on the left while tent encampments continue on both sides. The vertical neon lights are now more distant and sparse, creating a darker atmosphere with heavy rain continuing to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban park that transitions from a neon-lit promenade into a darker, more secluded area of makeshift encampments. It begins by following a character in a yellow jacket beneath a canopy of tall trees and vertical cyan neon lights, moving past park benches and trash bags as the character exits the frame. As the camera pushes deeper into the park, the tree-lined path opens into a wide plaza featuring a central fountain and digital billboards glowing on distant skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the path narrows past metal railings and a worker tending to crates, with the open plaza giving way to dense rows of tent encampments. Finally, the environment grows darker and more enclosed, moving past picnic tables into a section where the neon lights become sparse and the heavy rain intensifies.
